expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content. The lower game cards are partially hidden behind the bottom tab bar.
Several game cards on the right side are cut off, showing only partial thumbnails and labels. This makes the grid feel horizontally overflowing or misaligned.
The top category navigation is horizontally clipped, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
The hero carousel arrows sit very close to the screen edges and partially overlap the banner content, which looks cramped.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue specifically describes a problem with the Casino icon design or layout in the bottom navigation bar; reported issues focus on grid overlap, card clipping, and other navigation/carousel elements.
